rationale: Educ. Code §25.031 governs student assignment and transfer authority of school boards. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: In conformity with this subchapter, the board of trustees of a school district or the board of county school trustees or a school employee designated by the board may assign and transfer any student from one school facility or classroom to another within its jurisdiction.
_note: No conflict; rule text addresses student transfers, not property tax exemptions.
